description: PaperClip Recovery Actions — auto-detection and recovery for stalled agent workflows. Part of P5.1 / BTCAAAAA-26508.

recovery_scenarios.name: Exchange API Timeout Recovery
recovery_scenarios.description: Detect and recover stalled workflows related to exchange API calls (Binance, order placement, market data fetching).

recovery_actions.description: Post a diagnostic comment on the stalled issue to prompt agent self-recovery on next heartbeat.
Trigger the assigned agent's heartbeat to resume the stalled workflow.
Create an escalation issue for the CTO if auto-recovery fails after max attempts.

recovery_scenarios.name: Position Mismatch Detection
recovery_scenarios.description: Detect issues indicating position reconciliation failures or trade execution discrepancies.

recovery_actions.description: Post a diagnostic comment prompting the assignee to validate position state and resume.
Escalate to RiskAnalyst for manual position verification.

recovery_scenarios.name: Signal Generation Timeout
recovery_scenarios.description: Detect stalled signal generation pipelines (indicator computation, strategy evaluation, backtest runs).

recovery_actions.description: Post a diagnostic comment to prompt resumption from last checkpoint.
Escalate to the NautilusEngineer if signal pipeline stalls persist.

recovery_scenarios.name: Orphaned Checkout Recovery
recovery_scenarios.description: Detect issues that are checked out but have no live heartbeat run backing them (ghost/dead agent).

recovery_actions.description: Force-release the issue so it can be reassigned.
Notify the CTO of orphaned checkout requiring reassignment.

recovery_scenarios.name: Paused Agent Work Recovery
recovery_scenarios.description: Detect agents that are paused but still have assigned in_progress work, and resume them.

recovery_actions.description: Resume the paused agent so it can pick up stalled work.

recovery_state_schema.description: Per-issue recovery state tracked to prevent over-recovery and respect cooldown intervals.

fields.last_recovery_attempt_at: ISO timestamp of last recovery action
fields.recovery_attempts: Number of recovery attempts made for this scenario
fields.last_action: The last recovery action that was executed
fields.escalation_issue_id: UUID of the escalation issue if one was created
